baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, uncached repo snapshot path
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs forcing a cold buildRepoSnapshot(project) before each measurement

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, warmed repo snapshot cache
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs calling buildRepoSnapshot(project) after one cache-populating call within the cache window

environment.note: The repo snapshot cache is bounded to a short TTL (10s) and keyed per project root.
